definitions: 神性；神圣；神圣力量（divine nature or power）

examples.text: Long ago, there was a land called Hyrule, created by beings of supreme divinity. At the very edge of this kingdom, there lay a small forest.
examples.explanation: 这里的 divinity 指“神性、神圣力量”。beings of supreme divinity 可以理解为“拥有至高神性的存在”或“至高神明”。

source.text: The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time – Nintendo Direct 6.9.2026
